titleStmt.title: SII 22.392: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 392. (A.R. No. 392 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, TIRUMAYYAM. ROCK-CUT ŚIVA TEMPLE—ON THE ROCK TO THE WEST.

summary.p: This is a badly damaged epigraph with its beginning also lost. It is almost a duplicate of No. 387 above with a good portion of what is given there lost in this inscription. The text is however given there in part for comparison of the two records.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṟṟup patiṉmuṉṟān tiyatiyum pūrvapakṣattu daśamiyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirattu nāḷ kāṉaṉā
ḷum Innāṭṭuk kāpparāṉa Araiyarkaḷomum Innāṭṭu śrīrudra śrī māheśvararum pāṇṭi nāṭṭu nallataṟiyum
ttu śrīmāheśvararum śrīvayiṣṇavarkaḷum tirumalli nāṭṭu tirukkoṭuṅkuṉṟamuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟ koyiṟ śrīrudra śrīmāheśvararum
maintabhāradvāji nārāyaṇan kumārapaṭṭaṉāṉa Uṭaiyār tiruppāṇatātarum Ivvaṉaivomum Innāṭuṭaiya svastiśrīmaṟpra
nāyakkar maidhunaṉ Appaṇṇadaṇḍa nāyakkar muṉṉilaiyāka tirumeyattile kūṭi Iruntu kāriyam Aṟuti Iṭṭapaṭi Iva
naṭuṅkālam taṭaikiṭantu kiḻuruṇṭuḷḷa nāḷil Iṭaiyiṟ payireṟiṉa Āṇṭukaḷil Uṭal nāṭṭuviṉiyokamāka Aḻintu
kaṇakkiruntapaṭi keṭṭu Ivviraṇṭu tiṟavaṟkum porunta Aṟuti Iṭṭapaṭi tirumeyyattu Ūrum piṭākai
ṭirukūṟum tirumeyyattu mahādevar peṟuvārākavum mukkūṟum tirumeyyat temperumāṉ niṉṟaruḷiyatevar peṟuvārākavum
kaṭavaittuṭavalil tirunandavaṉam kiṉaṟuṭpaṭa teṟkaṭaiya nikki nikkiniṉṟa nirnilamum Innāyaṉār tevatāṉamāka
tavaṟku viṭṭu Itukkut talaimāṟāka vāṉavaṉmādeviśvaramuṭaiya nāyanāṟku viṭṭu Emperumāṉ niṉṟaruḷiya tevartevatā
koyilukkumelai māṅkuḻi Oṭaiyum viṭuvatākavum Iraṇṭu koyilukkum naṭuvu tirumatiḷ potumiṭattu paḷḷikoṇṭaruḷiṉa
ṇṇi nāṭṭiṉa kallum tirumatiḷāvatākavum vaṭatalait tirumatiṭcuvar paḷḷikoṇṭaruḷiya Āḻvār mukamaṇṭapattu me
muḻa Akalam cuvaṟkaṉamākat tirumatiḷ Iṭavum Ippaṭi Iṭumiṭattu teṟkiṟkaiyyuruvic cuvarai muṭṭac cevviṭile matiḷpo
ṇṭu tiṟavarum poruḷ nentu ceyvārkaḷākavum kaiyuruviccuvar kiḻakkup potumiṭattu vaṭakku nokkip pokiṟa
vācal neṭuveḷiyāka kiṭappatākavum Etc ṭhere Are 35 lines more which have been Omitted from here As Unnecessary
Digital edition of SII 22.392 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
